protocol.filesystem: VM /tmp on the same in-memory VFS for both flavors; native Node codec is host-memory only
protocol.fairness: same sidecar binary, host, sample counts, warmup, op order, and payloads

protocol.isolate: fresh Node process per sample; worker isolate pair per sample

guest UDP datagrams are unsupported in the current kernel-backed V8 bridge

critic_gaps: unsupported fixed op net/udp_echo_small: guest dgram send returns ERR_NOT_IMPLEMENTED for external UDP datagrams
fuzz did not confirm the non-P2 stdout fanout slow path
footprint run did not emit component attribution
